name: Peaches with Balsamic Vinegar and Black Pepper
recipeIngredient: 4 perfectly ripe fresh peaches or nectarines
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and drain the peaches.
2. Slice the peaches into 1/2-inch thick slices.
3. Place the sliced peaches in a large mixing bowl.
4. Add the balsamic vinegar, pepper, and sugar to the bowl.
5. Gently toss everything together to coat evenly.
6. Divide the mixture among 4 martini glasses.
7. Serve.
Yield: 4 servings
